title: Basic JavaScript Security Basics
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Security Basics. Focus on implementing Cross-site scripting (XSS) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Security Basics
description: Create a function that uses Cross-site scripting (XSS) and Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Security Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies Cross-site scripting (XSS), Cross-site request forgery (CSRF), Content Security Policy (CSP) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Security Basics
description: The following code has bugs related to Cross-site scripting (XSS). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Security Basics
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Cross-site scripting (XSS) and Cross-site request forgery (CSRF).
